Class AsyncClientHandler

java.lang.Object
it.polimi.ingsw.am22.network.server.AsyncClientHandler
All Implemented Interfaces:
ClientHandler
public final class AsyncClientHandler extends Object implements ClientHandler
Decorates a ClientHandler so send(ServerMessage) returns immediately — the actual delivery happens on a per-channel single-thread executor. This has two effects:
  • the broadcast loop never blocks on a slow/unreachable peer (each channel drains independently);
  • per-channel message ordering is preserved (single-thread executor = FIFO).

Binding state (boundNickname/boundMatchId) and close() are delegated to the wrapped handler. close() uses ExecutorService.shutdown() so already-queued messages (e.g. EndGameMessage/MatchClosedMessage) are still flushed before the underlying transport tears down.
